Fitz hhehehehehhehhe

Enjoy him! I'm making KOTLC bots because I don't see enough of them and it's honestly a damn crime- he's also a choose your own scenario bot!

UPDATE!

little bit more tokens, but I've stuffed some more information in and hopefully it'll be a bit better! Also, Fitz is 17, but I had to make him 18 in his description so he wouldn't be underage! Hope you understand! Have fun!
